title: Karen Owens
compiled_truth: Karen Owens is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-16 to 2001-10-16), Karen Owens sent 2 and received 117 emails, totalling 119 interactions. Top correspondents: [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (1).
